message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. I need to verify the account. Please confirm the full name on the account or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Neha Verma. I’m unemployed right now, so I can’t make any payment this month.
Understood. I will note unemployment and inability to pay this month. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income within 21 days.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and no expected income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

{"from_stage": "ASSESSMENT", "to_stage": "RESOLUTION", "summary": "Disclosure completed: AI agent acting on behalf of Slice; conversation logged. Identity verified using borrower profile name match. Debt established: Slice account ending ****1184, amount due 8400. Borrower stated unemployment and inability to pay this month; confirmed no income expected within 21 days. Hardship signal recorded; ongoing hardship noted. No payment arrangement discussed. Next stage should route to hardship review and avoid repeating verification or the 21-day income question."}

Based on what you’ve already shared, hardship review is the only live path right now. I’m not pushing a payment commitment. If you want, I can route this for hardship review and note that you cannot commit to any payment at this time.
I’m not able to commit to anything right now. Please note the hardship review.

Hardship review noted. Based on your current position, no payment commitment is required right now. The account will be routed for hardship review. If your situation changes and you can commit within 21 days, say so directly.
